query:
_index=sumologic_*_events AND _sourceCategory=cseInsight AND "{{ID}}"
| json "insight.readableId" nodrop
| where %"insight.readableId" = "{{ID}}"
| limit 1

| json "insight.timeToRemediation" as timeToRemediation nodrop

| if(IsEmpty(timeToRemediation), 0, timeToRemediation) as timeToRemediation

| floor(timeToRemediation/60/60/24) as timeToRemediation_days
| timeToRemediation - (timeToRemediation_days*24*60*60) as timeToRemediation

| floor(timeToRemediation/60/60) as timeToRemediation_hours
| timeToRemediation - (timeToRemediation_hours*60*60) as timeToRemediation

| floor(timeToRemediation/60) as timeToRemediation_minutes
| timeToRemediation - (timeToRemediation_minutes*60) as timeToRemediation

| floor(timeToRemediation) as timeToRemediation_seconds

| format("%s Days, %s Hrs, %s Min, %s Sec", ToInt(timeToRemediation_days), ToInt(timeToRemediation_hours), ToInt(timeToRemediation_minutes), ToInt(timeToRemediation_seconds)) as timeToRemediation

| count as Total timeToRemediation
| timeToRemediation as Total

sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides all comments (and other status changes) for an Insight provided in the filter.
